title: How to Enrol
intro: We welcome enrolment enquiries from new students from term 4 for the following year. Here's how to get started.

steps.heading: Check available classes
steps.body: Review our classes list and check your child's age and experience.

steps.heading: Contact us to express interest
steps.body: Email or click the Enrol button to let us know which class you're interested in. We'll let you know about availability and add you to the waitlist if needed.

steps.heading: Complete enrolment via ClubHub
steps.body: We use ClubHub to manage enrolments and payments. You'll receive a link to complete your registration and set up your family contribution.

steps.heading: Start Saturday lessons!
steps.body: Arrive at Dyer Street School, 9 Dyer Street, Lower Hutt at your class start time. Please be ready outside the classroom a few minutes early.

items.label: Location
items.value:
Dyer Street School
9 Dyer Street, Lower Hutt

clubhub.heading: Already enrolled?
clubhub.text: Log in to ClubHub to manage your details and payments
